title: Automate Claude budget-aware fallback for OMO-lite reviewer stages
summary: Resolve Claude reviewer availability automatically from repo-local signals, allow a local override, and persist fallback status when reviewer stages cannot run.
goal: Finish the OMO-lite Phase 7 budget-aware supervisor path so reviewer-stage fallback no longer depends on a manual flag for every run.

required_checks: pnpm exec vitest run tests/workflow-v2-docs.test.ts tests/omo-lite-config.test.ts tests/omo-lite-supervisor.test.ts tests/omo-lite-runner.test.ts tests/omo-lite-budget.test.ts

pnpm exec eslint scripts/lib/omo-lite-claude-budget.mjs scripts/lib/omo-lite-runner.mjs scripts/omo-lite-claude-budget.mjs scripts/omo-lite-run-stage.mjs tests/omo-lite-budget.test.ts tests/omo-lite-runner.test.ts
verify_commands: pnpm exec vitest run tests/workflow-v2-docs.test.ts tests/omo-lite-config.test.ts tests/omo-lite-supervisor.test.ts tests/omo-lite-runner.test.ts tests/omo-lite-budget.test.ts

pnpm exec eslint scripts/lib/omo-lite-claude-budget.mjs scripts/lib/omo-lite-runner.mjs scripts/omo-lite-claude-budget.mjs scripts/omo-lite-run-stage.mjs tests/omo-lite-budget.test.ts tests/omo-lite-runner.test.ts

out_of_scope: automatic GitHub merge or PR actions
open_questions: Should future pilot runs update Claude budget state from a machine-readable usage signal instead of auth presence only
How should prolonged awaiting_claude_or_human states be surfaced in a future dashboard
